meta.note: spendlabel `flow` paradigm. Webhook -> Gemini (OpenAI-compatible endpoint) -> parse 2-digit CPV -> respond {cpv}. Auth uses $env.GEMINI_API_KEY directly (run n8n with that env var and N8N_BLOCK_ENV_ACCESS_IN_NODE=false), so no credential setup is needed. The consumer (consumers/flow/classifier.py) POSTs {title, description} and reads back {cpv}.
